summary: Plan-only autonomous classification for live PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, fixes, merges, and post-merge closeout; listed PRs remain open for maintainer/author follow-up or proof/review.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft with active maintainer discussion and unresolved review findings; no close, fix, or merge action is allowed in this job.
Focused contributor bug-fix PR with a still-open linked issue and missing real behavior proof; classify independently and leave open.
Useful focused contributor PR, but it has failing checks and an unresolved review/change decision; no close/fix/merge path is permitted here.
Maintainer-owned draft with overlapping related maintainer work and unresolved review issues; leave open for maintainer decision.
Narrow maintainer-owned draft with proof, but still requires maintainer review and this job cannot merge or otherwise finalize it.

needs_human: #88212: maintainer-owned draft has active maintainer discussion and unresolved review findings around localModelLean direction.
#88323: contributor PR has failing relevant checks and unresolved change request despite supplied proof; fix/merge paths are disabled.
#88379: maintainer-owned draft overlaps related channel startup work and requires maintainer choice before finalization.
